title: macroscepis dutrae
intro: Macroscepis dutrae is a species of flowering plant in the family Bignonaceae. It is a medicinal plant known for its use in traditional medicine, particularly in Brazil, where it has been used to treat various health conditions. The plant's medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its chemical compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. Macroscepis dutrae has been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, digestive problems, and wounds, and it can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its herbal benefits.
